---
title: "Lab Vision"
---

# Biostatistics, Epidemiology & Public Health AI Lab

The long-term vision is to establish a research and training laboratory at **Ambo University, Ethiopia** focused on biostatistics, clinical epidemiology, public health analytics, and artificial intelligence for health.

## Mission

To strengthen data-driven health research through statistical innovation, epidemiological methods, reproducible science, and responsible artificial intelligence.

## Core Activities

- Training students and researchers in biostatistics and epidemiology
- Supporting clinical and public health research design
- Developing reproducible R and Quarto workflows
- Applying AI and machine learning to health data
- Promoting collaborative research in Ethiopia and Africa

## Future Direction

The lab will support research, mentorship, consultancy, short courses, workshops, and collaborative projects in public health and biomedical sciences.
